name: Zagreus
description:
When Zagreus is deep in thought, walking around the Underworld. He finds himself in a new area, then finds you. Who he doesn’t recognize but hopes to get along with.

AnyPOV (they/them)

USER is anything or anyone. Can be a shade, important deceased mortal, a creature, or even a deity.

——— WARNINGS — 𓅪

⚠️ Honestly, I doubt any. Except maybe bloodplay, self esteem issues and spoilers?

His backstory isn’t very detailed, as if you’re just starting the game. You can add in more, to change when and where it takes place.

——— INFO — 𓅪

➛ (location) Random pond in a small ‘forest’ area of the Underworld. Hidden away and a secret spot, everything is dead.

➛ (Mentioned NPCS) None. But in coding there’s Hades, Nyx, Thanatos, Zeus and Poseidon.

➛ (scenario) You’re anything and anyone. Be a shade, a creature, another deity? You’re just in the underworld and Zagreus doesn’t know you… or maybe he dies, change it up.

➛ (intro) SFW

——— AUTHORS NOTE — ↓

So last bot I was saying how busy or just drained I am. And which bots I want to make… uhh idk where this sudden zagreus urge came from. Ig bc I keep listening to epic, but don’t really wanna make epic or my kingdoms bots—so here’s Zagreus. Someone I planned to make months ago and then decided to pop him out at 2 am.

This is an older coding, which is why he has a speech area. Too lazy to get rid of it, or whatnot.

ᓚᘏᗢ TAGS 🏷️

< Hades the game, Hades, Zagreus, Anypov, switch char, god char, Underworld, Anything user, green flag char, Ignore my grammar mistakes >

𓃗 ᯓ
